body.title: CC Nightly: prepare tomorrow's context briefing
body.result: context prep script + 15 tests; Nanny schedule wired at 03:15/03:30
body.description:
Generate tomorrow's context briefing from today's session.

**Affected files:** palace.sessions.TOMORROW.brief (generated)
**Design rules:** context-optimization
**Scope boundary:** Generate briefing showing in-flight, high-priority tickets, key patterns, pending approvals
**Completion criteria:**
  1. Extract in-flight from slate and decision records
  2. Show high-priority tickets (priority > 0.6)
  3. Show pending decisions (status: design)
  4. List patterns validated today
  5. Generate palace.sessions.DATE+1.brief node
  6. Test: /context-load tomorrow shows prepared briefing
